name: autogun

commands.name: fmt

flags.name: overwrite
flags.helpText: update source files in-place instead of writing to stdout

flags.name: recursive
flags.helpText: format directories recursively

commands.helpText: Apply formatting to files in the workspace

flags.name: browser
flags.helpText: connect to the running browser instance by {URL}

flags.name: engine
flags.helpText: use the specified {ENGINE} (chromedp)

flags.name: device
flags.helpText: use the specified device {ID}

flags.name: exec-path
flags.helpText: run the browser at {PATH} (exec allocator)

flags.name: proxy-server
flags.helpText: route browser traffic through the proxy {SERVER} (exec allocator)

flags.name: user-agent
flags.helpText: set the default User-Agent header to {STRING} (exec allocator)

flags.name: user-data-dir
flags.helpText: use {DIR} as the Chrome profile directory (exec allocator)

flags.name: window-size
flags.helpText: set the initial window size, given as {WxH} (exec allocator)

flags.name: headless
flags.helpText: run the browser in headless mode (exec allocator)

flags.name: no-sandbox
flags.helpText: disable the browser sandbox (exec allocator)

flags.name: disable-gpu
flags.helpText: disable the GPU process (exec allocator)

flags.name: ignore-cert-errors
flags.helpText: ignore certificate-related errors (exec allocator)

flags.name: ws-url-timeout
flags.helpText: wait up to {DURATION} for the websocket URL (exec allocator)

flags.name: env
flags.helpText: pass {NAME=VALUE} into the browser process, repeatable (exec allocator)

flags.name: flag
flags.helpText: pass an arbitrary Chrome {NAME} or {NAME=VALUE} flag, repeatable (exec allocator)

flags.name: no-modify-url
flags.helpText: do not rewrite the websocket URL (remote allocator)

commands.name: check

flags.name: recursive
flags.helpText: format directories recursively

commands.helpText: Parse files to look for syntax errors

commands.name: version
commands.helpText: Print the build version then exit

flags.name: list-devices
flags.helpText: list available devices to emulate

flags.name: color
flags.helpText: Controls whether terminal color and styles are used

flags.name: no-color
flags.helpText: Disable terminal color and styles

flags.name: chdir
flags.helpText: Run the command as if started in a working DIRECTORY

flags.name: autogun-dir
flags.helpText: Set the path to the configuration DIRECTORY

flags.name: help
flags.helpText: Display this help screen then exit

flags.name: version
flags.helpText: Print the build version then exit

helpText: Use Autogun to detect and execute Web browser automation
